catalogName: Pitch Deck Storyboarder + Cap Table Builder
catalogDescription: Build a fundraising narrative that converts. Includes a professional 12-slide storyboard and a detailed Cap Table planner.
title: The High-Stakes Pitch Deck Storyboarder
subtitle: Stop Making Slides. Start Telling a Story That Gets Funded.
descriptionBody:
"Our solution is a first-of-its-kind, AI-driven..." If your deck starts like this, you've already lost. Most founders build decks by moving boxes in PowerPoint. Winning founders build decks by answering the brutal questions investors are actually thinking.

This isn't just a "template." It's a systematic storyboard that forces you to build a cohesive narrative, plus a master-grade Cap Table to prove you understand your own equity.
section1Body: A 12-slide battle-plan used by venture-backed founders to structure their Seed and Series A pitches. We don't give you pretty shapes; we give you the exact questions each slide must answer to pass the 'BS test'.

features.name: The 12-Slide Storyboard
features.desc: Slide-by-slide guide for Problem, Solution, Market, Traction, and Vision. No fluff.

features.name: The 'No-Mistakes' Cap Table
features.desc: Bonus Excel sheet. Model dilution, plan hiring pools, and calculate founder ownership after a SAFE/Convertible Note round.

features.name: Investor POV Checklist
features.desc: 100+ 'Brutal Questions' a VC will ask you about each specific slide.

features.name: The FOMO Builder
features.desc: Framework for structuring your 'Why Now?' slide to create urgency in the room.

whyTitle: Why this instead of a template?

whyPoints.title: Don't Waste $5k on a Designer
whyPoints.desc: Investors care about the clarity of your thought, not the color of your gradients. This system ensures your clarity is 10/10.

whyPoints.title: Master Your Dilution
whyPoints.desc: The included Cap Table tool prevents you from accidentally giving away 40% of your company in the first round.

whyPoints.title: Save 30+ Hours of Googling
whyPoints.desc: Stop looking for 'best pitch deck examples'. Just follow the system that works.

footerSummaryDetails: (Less than a typical SaaS subscription for one month).
footerResultDetails: A deck that actually makes sense and a clean cap table.
whoThisIsFor: Founders preparing for Seed or Series A pitches.
Early-stage teams planning their first equity round.
Solo founders who need to simplify their core narrative.
Builders who want to 'see' their dilution before it happens.

faq.q: Is the Cap Table tool included in this price?
faq.a: Yes! The Cap Table Planning Excel is included as a bonus with the Pitch Deck Storyboarder for a limited time.
The Storyboard is a interactive PDF/Notion guide, and the Cap Table is a fully editable Excel file.

faq.q: Can I use this for B2B or B2C?
faq.a: The framework is agnostic. It focuses on the core principles of venture-scale systems that apply to both.
